import emailjs from '@emailjs/browser'; const ContactForm = () => { const refForm = useRef const sendEmail = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); emailjs .sendForm('gmail', 'template_YeJhZkgb', form.current, 'your-token') .then( () => { alert('Message successfully sent!') window.location.reload(false) }, () => { alert('Failed to send the message, please try again') } ) } return ( <>
) } export default ContactForm
